## Describe the Bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- **macOS version**: (e.g. 14.2 Sonoma)
- **Elrond version**: (e.g. 0.1.0)
- **Node.js version**: (run `node --version`)

## Console Output

If applicable, open View > Developer Tools in the app menu and paste any error messages here.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.
